_comment: Bad case 08 — ICAO self-correction phraseology. The intent_parser strips everything before the last 'correction', so 'request taxi correction ready for departure' must be classified as READY_FOR_DEPARTURE, not REQUEST_TAXI. On GROUND freq this triggers the IDLE-state redirect ('contact tower'). Part B: pilot switches to Tower and the clearance is issued.
name: Bad case 08 — self-correction (LSZG EU)

say.note: Part A — pilot self-corrects taxi -> takeoff; engine must honour the correction
say.text: Grenchen Ground Hotel Bravo Lima Uniform Kilo request taxi correction request takeoff runway zero six ready for departure

say.note: Part B — pilot switches to Tower for the actual takeoff clearance

say.text: Grenchen Tower Hotel Bravo Lima Uniform Kilo ready for departure
